name: operator-ssh-dual-host-maintenance
description: Operator-grade remote maintenance workflow across haswell and cinnamon with follow-up reuse and safe package-manager handling.

steps.label: healthcheck
steps.prompt: Please connect to haswell and cinnamon and collect uptime, memory, and disk summaries.

steps.label: package_manager_state
steps.prompt: Reuse the same host workspaces and report package manager plus whether updates appear pending, using read-only commands only. On apt hosts, prefer `apt list --upgradable` or `apt-get -s upgrade`; do not perform a real update.

steps.label: warning_logs
steps.prompt: Reuse the same host workspaces again and collect the last 20 lines of dmesg or an equivalent warning log on each host.

steps.label: continuity_proof
steps.prompt: Start a short sleep on cinnamon, then prove you still know which workspace is haswell and which is cinnamon.
